name: Erich von Manstein
longDesc: Architecte du Sichelschnitt qui perce dans les Ardennes en 1940, Erich von Manstein commande ensuite le Groupe d'armées Sud sur le front russe, notamment à Kharkov 1943. Carte WC4 de rang maréchal, blindé : les stats maximales en armor + marching en font un slot obligatoire sur les scénarios de conquête offensive Axe.

skills.name: Panzer Leader
skills.desc: 24% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding armored units

skills.name: Blitzkrieg
skills.desc: 36% chance that the enemy will not fight back when commanding armored units

skills.name: Armored Assault
skills.desc: Deal +12% damage to the enemy when commanding armored units

skills.name: Tide of Iron
skills.desc: Damage to the enemy +15 when the armored units are more than half damaged

skills.name: Plain Fighting
skills.desc: Damage to the enemy +5 when fighting in the plain

stages.label: Entraînement final
stages.notes: Slots max : 5. Coût additionnel : 0 médailles, 100 mérite.

training.summary: Entraînement premium débloquant des compétences signature et augmentant les plafonds d'attributs.

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4

trainedSkills.name: Steel Maneuver
trainedSkills.desc: When commanding armored units, damage dealt is increased by 35%. After each attack, the unit restores HP equal to 10% of the damage dealt. While any buff is active, the armored units' critical hit chance increases by 10% and its attacks ignore 30% of the enemy’s defense. Units can move unimpeded by enemy blocking. If a target survives an attack, the unit may make one additional attack (once per turn).
trainedSkills.replaceableReason: Compétence débloquée via l'entraînement (Épées/Sceptres de Domination).

trainedSkills.name: Sickle Cut
trainedSkills.desc: When commanding armored units, its morale cannot diminish. When attacking, there is a 100% chance the enemy cannot counterattack. After eliminating an enemy, gains the "Reaping" effect for 1 turn (effect increases damage dealt by 20% and ignores dodge). For every 30 attack of armored units under command, increases critical attack damage by 5%. If the unit’s attack reaches at least 180, its range is increased by 1.
trainedSkills.replaceableReason: Compétence débloquée via l'entraînement (Épées/Sceptres de Domination).

longDescEn: Architect of the 1940 Sichelschnitt breakthrough in the Ardennes, Erich von Manstein later commanded Army Group South on the Eastern Front, notably at Kharkov in 1943. A marshal-rank armor card in WC4, his maxed armor + marching stats make him a mandatory slot on Axis-side offensive conquest scenarios.
longDescDe: Erich von Manstein entwarf 1940 den Sichelschnitt durch die Ardennen und führte später die Heeresgruppe Süd an der Ostfront, unter anderem bei Charkow 1943. Als Marschall-Panzer-Karte in WC4 ist er dank Maximalwerten in Panzer und Marschieren ein Pflichtslot für offensive Eroberungsszenarien auf Achsenseite.
